name: skills
description: Agent skills for product work: critiquing specs and implementation plans before execution, and running qualitative user-research interviews.

plugins.name: product-critique
plugins.description: Critique product planning artifacts before execution: a spec/design-doc/PRD reviewer and an implementation-plan reviewer. Findings come back as concrete proposed edits.

plugins.name: qualitative-product-research
plugins.description: Qualitative user-research skills: rehearse interviews with a coached roleplay, and get live next-question suggestions during a real interview.
